title: 10 Herbal Tonics to Help Teenagers Overcome Acne
description: Melaleuca alternifolia tinctures are known for their effectiveness in treating acne due to the presence of compounds like cymene, limonene, and sesquiterpenes. These constituents have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties that help combat acne-causing bacteria and reduce inflammation in the skin. When used as a tincture, these properties can penetrate deep into the pores, killing acne-causing bacteria and preventing further breakouts.  To use Melaleuca alternifoli...
